pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this title.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this title.
Task description specifies a vertical bar chart, and verifier.py accepts 'histogram', 'vertical_bar', or 'area'.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this title.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require a pie chart.
Task description specifies 'data.srcip' and verifier checks for 'srcip' in the aggregation field.
export_result.sh explicitly uses this username for Kibana API authentication.
export_result.sh explicitly uses this password for Kibana API authentication.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected SSH failure logs containing randomly assigned IP addresses and user names. The required visualisations are a histogram/bar chart named 'SSH Failures Over Time' and a pie chart named 'Top SSH Attacking IPs' aggregating on the 'data.srcip' field, to be placed on a dashboard named 'SSH Threat Monitoring'. All configuration details and API credentials exactly match the explicit instructions and export script constants.
